violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Uncovered pizza crust found in small walk-in freezer. Food items should be covered to protect from contamination.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving units and outer surfaces of equipment were found dirty. Cabinets under coffee machines and Pepsi dispenser were also found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. Scoop drawer near the pizza oven was found dirty. Clean equipment should be stored in a clean location.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
